title: mcpcheck configuration
description: Configuration for the mcpcheck linter. See https://github.com/MukundaKatta/mcpcheck

rules.description: Per-rule enablement and severity. Omitted rules keep their defaults.

missingTransport.description: Server has no transport — A server entry has neither `command` (stdio) nor `url` (http/sse).

conflictingTransport.description: Transport fields contradict each other — Both `command` and `url` are set, or `transport` disagrees with them.

invalidCommand.description: `command` is missing or not a string — `command` must be a non-empty string.

invalidArgs.description: `args` is not an array of strings — `args` has to be an array of strings.

invalidEnv.description: `env` is not a string-valued object — `env` must be an object, and each value must be a string.

hardcodedSecret.description: Hardcoded API key — A value in `env` matches a known secret format (OpenAI, Anthropic, GitHub, AWS, Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid, HuggingFace, npm, GitLab, Slack, Azure, Google).

invalidUrl.description: URL is malformed, non-http(s), or insecure — `url` does not parse, isn't http/https, or is plain http to a non-local host.

invalidTransport.description: `transport` value is not one of the accepted tokens — `transport` must be one of `stdio`, `sse`, `streamable-http`.

unknownField.description: Unknown field on a server — A field on the server object isn't in the MCP schema.

relativePath.description: `command` starts with `./` or `../` — The command is a relative path.

emptyServers.description: Config has no server entries — No `mcpServers` / `servers` / `context_servers` key, or it is empty.

duplicateServerName.description: Case-insensitive duplicate server name — Two server entries differ only by case.

unstableReference.description: Unpinned package or image reference — `npx <pkg>` / `uvx <pkg>` / `docker run <image>` without a pinned version.

dangerousCommand.description: Privilege escalation, remote-shell pipe, or host-root mount — Config instructs the client to execute `curl | sh`, `sudo`, `docker --privileged`, `-v /:/`, or similar.

httpWithoutAuth.description: HTTPS server without an Authorization header — A URL-transport server targets an https endpoint but declares no `Authorization` header.

duplicateEnvKey.description: Case-colliding env var names on a server — Two entries in `env` differ only by case (e.g. `API_KEY` and `ApiKey`).

shellMetachars.description: Shell metacharacters without a shell — `command` contains `|`, `;`, `$(…)`, backticks, `&&`, `||`, `&`, or `$VAR` but isn't a shell.

typosquatPackage.description: Package name looks like a typo of an official MCP server — An `npx` / `uvx` package name is within edit distance 3 of an official `@modelcontextprotocol/*` server but doesn't match it.

include.description: Extra glob patterns to treat as MCP configs.

plugins.description: npm package names implementing the `Plugin` interface exported from `mcpcheck`.

enabled.description: Turn the rule on or off entirely.

severity.description: Severity to report at. `off` is equivalent to `enabled: false` but allows toggling without losing the severity.
